base_annual_fee.source_clause: Total Annual O&M Fee of INR 18,00,00,000 (Eighteen Crores only) comprising Wind Component: INR 12,00,00,000 and Solar Component: INR 6,00,00,000, payable monthly.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly O&M Fee of INR 1,50,00,000 (Wind: INR 1,00,00,000 + Solar: INR 50,00,000) payable by 5th of each month.

escalation.source_clause: The combined Annual Fee (Wind + Solar components) shall be escalated annually on April 1 using WPI All Commodities January index, capped at 8% per annum.

variable_component.source_clause: Blended variable O&M rate of INR 0.032 per net kWh across wind and solar generation, billed quarterly.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Blended Availability Guarantee of 96.5% for the combined Hybrid Park. Wind Turbine Availability ≥ 95.5%; Solar Panel Availability ≥ 98.0% measured separately but aggregated for LD calculation.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: LD rate of 1.0% of Total Annual O&M Fee per PP shortfall below blended 96.5% availability guarantee.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum aggregate LD liability capped at 18% of Total Annual O&M Fee in any Contract Year.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: Performance bonus threshold of blended 98.0% availability. Bonus rate: 1.2% of Total Annual Fee per PP above threshold. Cap: 6% of Annual Fee.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Bonus rate of 1.2% of Total Annual O&M Fee per PP outperformance above blended 98.0% threshold.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Payment within 45 days of valid invoice receipt. NTPC-style payment terms reflect PSU customer convention.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Overdue amounts: SBI Base Rate + 2% p.a., simple interest.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: 12 months written notice for non-renewal of the Agreement.

validation_warnings: COMPLEXITY: Hybrid contract tracks wind + solar separately for LD purposes. Variable rate INR 0.032 is a blended rate — verify it reflects actual MW split.
FLAG: medium confidence on variable_component — clause 7.3 uses 'approximately' language. Verify blended rate calculation methodology.
